positive: A beautifully composed, symmetrical graphic illustration featuring a celestial scene. Central subject is a stylized crescent moon intertwined with delicate, glowing bioluminescent vines and constellations. The design should evoke vintage bohemian aesthetics mixed with Art Nouveau symmetry and intricate mandalas. Use a high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, teal, warm gold leaf accents, and soft emerald green. Ensure strong, clean silhouettes and sharp graphic quality suitable for commercial screen printing on apparel. The background should be a solid, uniform midnight blue to maximize contrast and focus on the central motif. Intricate linework, vector graphic quality, clean edges, high detail.
negative: blurry, noise, text, watermark, artifact, distorted, ugly, low resolution, poor composition, extra limbs, poor anatomy, photography, realistic photo, messy, gradient
